## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 12, 2026 - Jul 12, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Chris Johnston_, Jul 12, 2026, 3/5: "past 2 months I get age restricted! trying to open Poe and it says I must go to the Google playstore and get cleared. and coming here does nothing. sometimes I can bypass this by clicking on the Poe home button but now even that isn't possible. . im 58 years old....fix this glitch!"
